overview: ARMY Hub is a BTS fan platform where ARMYs discover and enjoy BTS live shows, songs, K-dramas, manhwas, and fan fiction — all in one place. Features include embedded playback for lives and songs, cover photo cards, multilingual content, a personal watchlist, community feed, and an admin panel for managing content.
features: Cover photo thumbnails on all content cards
Embedded YouTube player for BTS live shows
Embedded Spotify, YouTube, and SoundCloud players for BTS songs
Multilingual manhwas (English, French, Hindi, Korean, Spanish)
Genre and language filters on all content pages
Personal watchlist to save and manage links
Community feed — public browsing, login to post/like/comment
Onboarding modal collecting country, fandom, language, and subtitle preferences
Admin panel to add, edit, and delete content
Fan fiction page with Wattpad and YouTube aggregation
